unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yesterday, a pigeon carried the first message from Pinhurst to Silbury.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：pi(屁) + geon(鸽) -> 屁股上长了长羽毛的信鸽。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yesterday, a pigeon carried the first message from Pinhurst to Silbury.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：mess(混乱) + age(时代) -> 混乱的时代，传递准确的信息非常重要。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The bird covered the distance in three minutes.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：co(合) + ver(转) -> 盖子盖上转过来，盖子就是覆盖(cover)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The bird covered the distance in three minutes.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：dis(分开) + tance(站) -> 分开站着，彼此之间就有了距离。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Up to now, Mr. Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts and other urgent messages from one garage to the other.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：re(再次) + quest(寻求) -> 再次寻求某物，就是表达“请求”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Up to now, Mr. Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts and other urgent messages from one garage to the other.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：spare(备用的) + part(零部件) -> 备用的零部件就是“备件”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In this way, he has begun his own private 'telephone' service.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：ser(serve,服务) + vice(副职) -> 副职员工提供的专业服务。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Mr. James Scott has a garage in Silbury and now he has just bought another garage in Pinhurst.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：ga(家) + rage(愤怒) -> 家里车库被废旧汽配塞满，令人愤怒。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yesterday, a pigeon carried the first message from Pinhurst to Silbury.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：car(小汽车) + ry -> 小汽车可以运送(carry)各种货物。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Up to now, Mr. Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts and other urgent messages from one garage to the other.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：ur(你) + gent(绅士) -> 你这绅士，请帮我处理这件紧急的事情。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In this way, he has begun his own private 'telephone' service.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：pri(个人) + vate(玩特) -> 私人有特权，可以尽情玩特长。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Up to now, Mr. Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts and other urgent messages from one garage to the other.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: up to now vs so far
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：up(向上/到) + to(至) + now(现) -> 一直到现在，到目前为止。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Up to now, Mr. Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts and other urgent messages from one garage to the other.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: a great many vs a great deal of
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：a great(一个伟大的) + many(很多) -> 极多、大量的(接可数名词复数)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In this way, he has begun his own private 'telephone' service.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: in this way vs in a way
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：in(在……中) + this(这) + way(路/方法) -> 用这种方法，以这种方式。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 顺便说一句，顺便问一下
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: By the way, have you seen Harry recently?
unit_vocabulary.comparison: by the way vs on the way
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：by(在……旁边) + the way(路) -> 走在路旁，顺便问一句。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Please move this chair. It is in the way.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: in the way vs in this way
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：in(在) + the way(路中央) -> 挡在路正中间，十分碍事。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: On the way to the station, I bought some chocolate.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: on the way vs by the way
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想：on(在……之上) + the way(旅途) -> 处于前行的路途中。
